title: Running Kubelet in Standalone Mode — Enable IPv4 packet forwarding
text:
To check if IPv4 packet forwarding is enabled:
cat /proc/sys/net/ipv4/ip_forward
If the output is
1
, it is already enabled. If the output is
0
, then follow next steps.
To enable IPv4 packet forwarding, create a configuration file that sets the
net.ipv4.ip_forward
parameter to
1
:
sudo tee /etc/sysctl.d/k8s.conf
<<EOF
net.ipv4.ip_forward = 1
EOF
Apply the changes to the system:
sudo sysctl --system
The output is similar to:
...
* Applying /etc/sysctl.d/k8s.conf ...
net.ipv4.ip_forward = 1
* Applying /etc/sysctl.conf ...
